description_long: This coffee machine features a rounded, compact body with a smooth, light beige exterior accented by dark brown and black components. The front displays a central spout beneath a control panel with three round buttons and indicator lights, as well as a drip tray with a perforated surface. On the right side, a steam wand is attached, while the left side has a prominent portafilter handle extending outward. The back of the machine is dominated by a translucent water reservoir, allowing visibility of the water level. The top is flat with a small knob and a metallic handle, likely for lifting or accessing the internal compartment. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for countertop use in urban environments.
description: A compact, modern coffee machine with a rounded beige body, dark accents, a visible portafilter, steam wand, and a translucent water reservoir at the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with three buttons, central spout, drip tray, and the steam wand on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extended portafilter handle and the side profile of the water reservoir.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full translucent water reservoir and the back of the steam wand.
description_view_3: Right side view with the portafilter handle visible, the steam wand, and the side of the control panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Three round buttons arranged vertically on the upper left front, each with a small indicator light beside or above it.
